raw_response:
[
  {
    "Step_id": 1,
    "Target": "cup",
    "Action concept": "Push",
    "Manipulation mode": "Single-arm (right)",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "frontally",
    "Precondition": "The cup is in front of box_2 and reachable by the right arm. The area forward of the cup toward the table edge is clear so the cup can be slid without colliding with other objects or falling off the table.",
    "Postcondition": "The cup is gently slid 15-20 cm forward, creating an unobstructed frontal workspace in front of both boxes."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 2,
    "Target": "box_2",
    "Action concept": "Push",
    "Manipulation mode": "Single-arm (right)",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "frontally",
    "Precondition": "The cup has been moved away. The region in front of box_2 is now free, allowing the robot to contact its front face and push it straight forward without interference. There is at least 30 cm of free table depth to accommodate the box displacement.",
    "Postcondition": "box_2 is slid approximately 25 cm forward, breaking its side contact with box_1 and leaving the left-hand box_1 fully accessible on all lateral faces."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 3,
    "Target": "box_1",
    "Action concept": "Grasp",
    "Manipulation mode": "Dual-arm symmetric",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "box_1 is isolated with at least 5 cm clearance on both sides. Both arms can approach the box laterally without obstruction. The tabletop area around the box is clear and the box weight is within the robot’s dual-arm lifting capability.",
    "Postcondition": "box_1 (the darker box) is securely grasped from its left and right faces and lifted several centimeters above the tabletop, completing the pick-up task while leaving other objects undisturbed."
  }
]

parsed_json.Precondition: The cup is in front of box_2 and reachable by the right arm. The area forward of the cup toward the table edge is clear so the cup can be slid without colliding with other objects or falling off the table.
parsed_json.Postcondition: The cup is gently slid 15-20 cm forward, creating an unobstructed frontal workspace in front of both boxes.

parsed_json.Precondition: The cup has been moved away. The region in front of box_2 is now free, allowing the robot to contact its front face and push it straight forward without interference. There is at least 30 cm of free table depth to accommodate the box displacement.
parsed_json.Postcondition: box_2 is slid approximately 25 cm forward, breaking its side contact with box_1 and leaving the left-hand box_1 fully accessible on all lateral faces.

parsed_json.Precondition: box_1 is isolated with at least 5 cm clearance on both sides. Both arms can approach the box laterally without obstruction. The tabletop area around the box is clear and the box weight is within the robot’s dual-arm lifting capability.
parsed_json.Postcondition: box_1 (the darker box) is securely grasped from its left and right faces and lifted several centimeters above the tabletop, completing the pick-up task while leaving other objects undisturbed.
